title: T-Cut CSU150 Blue Scratch Remover Color Fast Paintwork Restorer Car Polish - 150g plus a Wax Applicator Set with Handle* 6 Colours Available
features: T-Cut Colourfast Scratch remover (patent pending formula) removes scratches, scuffs, blemishes and adds colour in one easy application.
T-Cut is enhanced by the latest nanotechnology, making it easier to remove light scratches* and mask, deeper scratches.
The coloured pigments blend in with all shades of paintwork, cleaning and removing oxidation, creating a flawless colour-matched finish.
Applicator Set: Super soft microfiber and foam pad evenly applies waxes, polishes, sealants, creams, and glazes, Safe to use on hard surfaces, paints and clear coats.
Use the Blue pad to apply wax evenly. Use the Yellow pad to buff & remove residue. Use the White pad to add amazing shine
description: From the manufacturer T-Cut Color Fast Blue Car Wax Polish Scratch Remover Colour Enhancer - 150g * 6 Colours Available T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover is designed to easily remove blemishes, scuffs, and light surface scratches in a simple application. a surface Scratch can be identified by passing a fingernail over the mark and feeling no obstruction. T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover is enhanced by colour pigments and advanced wax technology to enrich the depth of colour of your paintwork whilst also masking deeper scratches. Brand T-cut Color Blue Finish Type Gloss Size 150g Unit Count 150.0 T-Cut Wax Applicator Set with Handle, Color May Vary Super soft microfiber and foam pad evenly applies waxes, polishes, sealants, creams, and glazes. Safe to use on hard surfaces, paints and clear coats. Ergonomic handle for comfort and reduction in hand fatigue and cramping. Handle helps keep application pressure even for a perfect finish. All Machine washable and reusable Material Foam Brand T-cut Item Weight 1.48 Ounces
